noAccess.title: No access to property
noAccess.description: You don't have permission to view this household's property. Ask an owner for access.

error.description: Something went wrong loading this household's property. Try again in a moment.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Renovation and improvement projects for this household.

empty.description: Projects you plan and track will show up here.

budgetEstimate.hint: Your planned spend for this project.

form.invalidDates: Target end can't be before target start.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.placeholder: Tasks arrive in the next update.

links.placeholder: Links arrive in the next update.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.placeholder: Attachments arrive in the next update.

notFound.title: Project not found
notFound.description: This project doesn't exist or you no longer have access.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete project?
deleteConfirm.description: “{name}” and its tasks, links, and attachments will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Recurring maintenance plans and their upcoming occurrences.

logbook.title: Logbook
